title: isotrema kechangense
intro: Isotrema kechangense, also known as Yunnan isotrema, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a traditional medicinal plant used in the treatment of fever, colds, and respiratory infections, and is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and boosting the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, Isotrema kechangense is often made into a decoction or infusion by boiling the plant's roots and stems in water to create a medicinal tea.
